title: How to submit app to be listed on your integrations page

posts.author: asherrwood (Scott S)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi

I’ve seen that you have a list of apps at monday.com integrations that integrate with monday.com

Do you have any information on how to submit details of new integrations for consideration to be listed on this page please?

Thanks
Scott

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @asherrwood!

The integrations you see on that page are native to our monday.com platform and have been built by our in-house developers.

If you’re looking to build an integration yourself, you can definitely do so and then submit it to be approved and listed on our apps marketplace.

Thanks!

posts.author: asherrwood (Scott S)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Helen

Thanks for the quick response.

We do already have an integration with yourself and we actually improved it last week. Some details of this can be seen at https://www.testlodge.com/test-case-tool-integrations/monday and on our blog at https://blog.testlodge.com/monday-test-case-management/

Can I ask what the best way is to submit it for approval to be listed please?
(We would love to start pushing the connection a little more now its had a few more features added.)

Thanks
Scott

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Scott!

We’ve written a guide to help you prepare for our marketplace review process. Check it out here: Submit your app

Cheers
Dipro

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
